name: TFD Bus Co
recent_news: TFD ceased business operations in 2007; Mount Vernon CSD now uses First Student and All County Bus per district records. Not an active acquisition target.
fit_notes: DEFUNCT - ceased operations 2007. Not a tuck-in target. Mount Vernon contracts already absorbed by First Student (a Summit competitor) and All County Bus.

name: Willow Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Yelp lists business as CLOSED (updated Jan 2026); NY Dept of State filing technically active but Statement Status past due since 2009 - suggests dormant/wind-down. 72-year-old family business.
fit_notes: Likely dormant/closed - Yelp shows closed and corporate filings past due since 2009. If still operating in any form, classic small succession story (Pierce Sr, 70+ year-old company). Worth a phone outreach to confirm status before deeper diligence.

name: Northern Westchester Bus-Truck
recent_news: Address 6 Dogwood Rd Cortlandt Manor is currently the listed location of Hudson Valley Charter Service (motorcoach/charter operator); Northern Westchester Bus-Truck name not surfaced in current operator directories or NY DOT bus profiles. May be a dba, dissolved entity, or rebranded into Hudson Valley Charter.
fit_notes: Likely the legacy name now operating as Hudson Valley Charter Service - if so, charter/motorcoach not yellow school bus, so weak fit for Summit student-transport tuck-in. Confirm before pursuing.

name: Little Falls Bus Corp
districts_or_customers: Saint Johnsville/Fonda area Mohawk Valley districts
recent_news: Active operator (DOT# 3615140 - Little Falls Fonda Bus Corp). 45 employees per dataset, ~25 years in business. No M&A news.
fit_notes: Genuine independent family-owned Mohawk Valley school bus operator (Little Falls + Fonda combined corp). ~$1.8M revenue, small but clean profile. Possible Summit tuck-in to extend upstate NY footprint; Brown is single principal - succession angle plausible.

name: Big Apple Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Lawrence UFSD / Five Towns Nassau area (likely)
recent_news: No direct web presence; address 141 Lawrence Ave Inwood appears residential per Spokeo/Ownerly records. Dominant local school bus operator in Inwood is Independent Coach Corp (25 Wanser Ave, family-owned since 1941) - Big Apple may be a small sub-contractor or dba.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as active independent school bus operator. Small (~36 employees per dataset) potentially owner-operated. If real, classic Five Towns mom-and-pop - call to confirm operating status before pursuing. Lawrence UFSD area is dense with established competitors (Independent Coach, WE Transport).
